detailEmpty.title: Select a file to edit
detailEmpty.description: Choose a JSON file from the tree on the left

deleteNamespace.title: Delete namespace
deleteNamespace.description: Are you sure you want to delete «{{name}}»? The file will be removed from all locales.

deleteFolder.title: Delete folder
deleteFolder.description: Are you sure you want to delete «{{name}}»? All files inside will be removed from all locales.
